snapshot.title: Lebanon president rejects Israeli occupation, foreign interference as Washington talks begin
snapshot.description: BEIRUT: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun on Tuesday rejected Israel’s occupation of south Lebanon and other foreign interference, alluding to Iran, as a fifth round of Israel-Lebanon talks began in Washington. “We accept nothing less than an end to the Israeli occupation and at the same time, the fall of foreign tutelage, because our only option is our national sovereignty and
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Lebanon president rejects Israeli occupation, foreign interference as Washington talks begin | Arab News
